granular.description: Multi-agent coordination (shared message bus + persistent diaries). Actions: register (join with agent_type+role), post (broadcast or direct message with category), read (poll messages), status (update state: active|idle|finished), handoff (transfer task to another agent with summary), sync (overview of all agents + pending messages + shared contexts), diary (log discovery/decision/blocker/progress/insight — persisted across sessions), recall_diary (read agent diary), diaries (list all agent diaries), list, info.

action.description: Agent operation. diary: persistent log. share_knowledge: broadcast key=value facts (message: 'k1=v1;k2=v2'). receive_knowledge: poll shared facts from other agents.

agent_type.description: Agent type for register (cursor, claude, codex, gemini, crush, subagent)

category.description: Message category for post (finding, warning, request, status)

message.description: Message text for post action, or status detail for status action

to_agent.description: Target agent ID for direct message (omit for broadcast)

granular.name: ctx_agent

granular.description: Entropy analysis — recommends optimal compression mode for a file.
granular.name: ctx_analyze

granular.description: Graph-based architecture analysis. Actions: overview|clusters|layers|cycles|entrypoints|module.
granular.name: ctx_architecture

granular.description: Context artifact registry + BM25 index. Actions: list|status|index|reindex|search|remove.
granular.name: ctx_artifacts

granular.description: Benchmark compression modes for a file or project.

format.description: Output format for project benchmark: terminal, markdown, json

granular.name: ctx_benchmark

granular.description: Cache ops: status|clear|invalidate.
granular.name: ctx_cache

granular.description: Compatibility meta-tool: call any ctx_* tool by name using a stable schema. Useful for MCP clients that freeze tool registries at startup (static tools/list).

arguments.description: Arguments object for the tool. Passed through as-is.

granular.name: ctx_call

granular.description: Find all functions/methods called by a given symbol. Deprecated alias for ctx_callgraph direction=callees.

file.description: Optional: scope to a specific file

symbol.description: Symbol name to find callees of

granular.name: ctx_callees

granular.description: Find all symbols that call a given function/method. Deprecated alias for ctx_callgraph direction=callers.

file.description: Optional: scope to a specific file

symbol.description: Symbol name to find callers of

granular.name: ctx_callers

granular.description: Unified call graph query. direction=callers|callees for a symbol. Returns file/symbol/line edges.

file.description: Optional: scope to a specific file

granular.name: ctx_callgraph

granular.description: Context checkpoint for long conversations.
granular.name: ctx_compress

granular.description: Compress a memory/config file (CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, etc.) to save tokens on every session start. Preserves code blocks, URLs, paths, headings, tables. Creates .original.md backup.
granular.name: ctx_compress_memory

granular.description: Session context overview — cached files, seen files, session state.
granular.name: ctx_context

granular.description: Cost attribution (local-first). Actions: report|agent|tools|json|reset.
granular.name: ctx_cost

granular.description: Cross-file dedup: analyze or apply shared block references.

action.description: analyze (default) or apply (register shared blocks for auto-dedup in ctx_read)

granular.name: ctx_dedup

granular.description: Incremental diff — sends only changed lines since last read.
granular.name: ctx_delta

granular.description: Find missed compression opportunities in shell history.

limit.description: Max number of command types to show (default: 15)

granular.name: ctx_discover

granular.description: Edit a file via search-and-replace. Works without native Read/Edit tools. Use this when the IDE's Edit tool requires Read but Read is unavailable.

create.description: Create a new file with new_string as content (ignores old_string)

old_string.description: Exact text to find and replace (must be unique unless replace_all=true)

granular.name: ctx_edit

granular.description: Run code in sandbox (11 languages). Only stdout enters context. Raw data never leaves subprocess. Languages: javascript, typescript, python, shell, ruby, go, rust, php, perl, r, elixir.

action.description: batch — execute multiple scripts. Provide items as JSON array [{language, code}]

intent.description: What you want from the output (triggers intent-driven filtering for large results)

items.description: JSON array of [{"language": "...", "code": "..."}] for batch execution

path.description: For action=file: process a file in sandbox (auto-detects language)

granular.name: ctx_execute

granular.description: Retrieve archived tool output (zero-loss). Large outputs are auto-archived; use this to retrieve full details. Actions: retrieve (default), list.

search.description: Search pattern to filter archived output

granular.name: ctx_expand

granular.description: Harness feedback for LLM output tokens/latency (local-first). Actions: record|report|json|reset|status.

agent_id.description: Agent ID (optional; defaults to current agent when available)

limit.description: For report/json: how many recent events to consider (default: 500)

granular.name: ctx_feedback

granular.description: Budget-aware context fill — auto-selects compression per file within token limit.

task.description: Optional task for POP intent-driven pruning

granular.name: ctx_fill

granular.description: Gain report (includes Wrapped via action=wrapped).
granular.name: ctx_gain

granular.description: Unified code graph. Actions: build (index), related (connected files), symbol (def/usages), impact (blast radius), status (stats), enrich (add commits+tests+knowledge), context (task-based query), diagram (Mermaid deps/calls).

action.description: Graph operation: build, related, symbol, impact, status, enrich, context, diagram

granular.name: ctx_graph

granular.description: Generate a Mermaid diagram of the dependency or call graph. Deprecated alias for ctx_graph action=diagram.

file.description: Optional: scope to dependencies of a specific file

kind.description: deps (file dependencies) or calls (symbol call graph)

granular.name: ctx_graph_diagram

granular.description: Context Ledger Protocol (hashed, deterministic, local-first). Actions: create|show|list|pull|clear.

apply_knowledge.description: For pull: import knowledge facts (default: true)

apply_session.description: For pull: apply session/task snapshot (default: true)

apply_workflow.description: For pull: apply workflow state (default: true)

paths.description: Optional file paths to include as signatures-only curated refs (for create)

granular.name: ctx_handoff

granular.description: File access heatmap (local-first). Actions: status|directory|cold|json.
granular.name: ctx_heatmap

granular.description: Graph-based impact analysis. Actions: analyze|chain|build|status.

path.description: Target file path (required for analyze). For chain: from->to spec.

granular.name: ctx_impact

granular.description: Index orchestration. Actions: status|build|build-full.
granular.name: ctx_index

granular.description: Structured intent input (optional) — submit compact JSON or short text; server also infers intents automatically from tool calls.

query.description: Compact JSON intent or short text

granular.name: ctx_intent

granular.description: Persistent project knowledge across sessions (facts, patterns, history). Supports recall modes, embeddings, feedback, and typed relations.

category.description: Fact category (architecture, api, testing, deployment, conventions, dependencies)

mode.description: Recall mode (default: auto). exact: lexical only. semantic: embeddings-only. hybrid: semantic + exact matches. auto: hybrid if embeddings available, else exact.

pattern_type.description: Pattern type for pattern action (naming, structure, testing, error-handling)

query.description: Query/target (recall query, relate target 'category/key', relations direction in|out|all).

resolution.description: For gotcha action: how to fix/avoid it (e.g. 'Use .clone() or ref pattern')

severity.description: For gotcha action: severity level (default: warning)

trigger.description: For gotcha action: what triggers the bug (e.g. 'cargo build fails with E0507 on match arms')

value.description: Value for action (fact value, pattern text, feedback up/down, relation kind).

granular.name: ctx_knowledge

granular.description: Session token stats, cache rates, per-tool savings.
granular.name: ctx_metrics

granular.description: Batch read files in one call. Same modes as ctx_read.

mode.description: Compression mode (default: full). Same modes as ctx_read (auto, full, map, signatures, diff, aggressive, entropy, task, reference, lines:N-M).

paths.description: Absolute file paths to read, in order

granular.name: ctx_multi_read

granular.description: List all symbols in a file (functions, structs, classes, methods) with signatures. Much fewer tokens than reading the full file.
granular.name: ctx_outline

granular.description: Task-relevant project map — use at session start.

task.description: Task description for relevance scoring (e.g. 'fix auth bug in login flow')

granular.name: ctx_overview

granular.description: PR Context Pack. action=pr yields changed files, related tests, impact summary, and relevant context artifacts.

base.description: Git base ref (default: auto-detect or HEAD~1)

diff.description: Optional git diff --name-status text. If omitted, computed via git.

granular.name: ctx_pack

granular.description: Predictive prefetch — prewarm cache for blast radius files (graph + task signals) within budgets.

budget_tokens.description: Soft budget hint for mode selection (default: 3000)

changed_files.description: Optional changed files (paths) to compute blast radius

granular.name: ctx_prefetch

granular.description: Proactive context loader — caches task-relevant files, returns L-curve-optimized summary (~50-100 tokens vs ~5000 for individual reads).

task.description: Task description (e.g. 'fix auth bug in validate_token')

granular.name: ctx_preload

granular.description: Export a machine-readable ContextProofV1 (Verifier + SLO + Pipeline + Provenance). Writes to .lean-ctx/proofs/ by default.

max_ledger_files.description: Max context ledger top files to include (default: 10)

granular.name: ctx_proof

granular.description: External context provider (GitLab-first). Actions: gitlab_issues (list), gitlab_issue (show by iid), gitlab_mrs (list MRs), gitlab_pipelines (list pipelines). Requires GITLAB_TOKEN or LEAN_CTX_GITLAB_TOKEN.

state.description: Filter by state (opened, closed, merged, all)

granular.name: ctx_provider

granular.description: Read file (cached, compressed). Cached re-reads can be ~13 tok when unchanged. Auto-selects optimal mode. Modes: full|map|signatures|diff|aggressive|entropy|task|reference|lines:N-M. fresh=true forces a disk re-read.

fresh.description: Bypass cache and force a full re-read. Use when running as a subagent that may not have the parent's context.

mode.description: Compression mode (default: full). Use 'map' for context-only files. For line ranges: 'lines:N-M' (e.g. 'lines:400-500').

start_line.description: Read from this line number to end of file. Implies fresh=true (disk re-read) to avoid stale snippets.

granular.name: ctx_read

granular.description: Compress LLM response text (remove filler, apply TDD).
granular.name: ctx_response

granular.description: Automated code review: combines impact analysis, caller tracking, and test discovery. Actions: review (single file), diff-review (from git diff), checklist (structured review questions).

path.description: File path to review (or git diff text for diff-review)

granular.name: ctx_review

granular.description: List HTTP routes/endpoints extracted from the project. Supports Express, Flask, FastAPI, Actix, Spring, Rails, Next.js.
granular.name: ctx_routes

granular.description: Regex code search (.gitignore aware, compact results). Deterministic ordering. Secret-like files (e.g. .env, *.pem) are skipped unless role allows. ignore_gitignore requires explicit policy.

ignore_gitignore.description: Set true to scan ALL files including .gitignore'd paths (default: false). Requires role policy (e.g. admin).

granular.name: ctx_search

granular.description: Semantic code search (BM25 + optional embeddings/hybrid). action=reindex to rebuild.

mode.description: Search mode (default: hybrid). bm25=lexical only, dense=embeddings only, hybrid=BM25+embeddings

path_glob.description: Optional: glob over relative file paths (e.g. "rust/src/**" or "**/*.rs")

granular.name: ctx_semantic_search

granular.description: Cross-session memory (CCP). Actions: load (restore ~400 tok), save, status, task, finding, decision, reset, list, cleanup, snapshot, restore, resume, profile (context profiles), role (governance), budget (limits), slo (observability), diff (compare sessions), verify (output verification stats), episodes (episodic memory), procedures (procedural memory).

session_id.description: Session ID for load action (default: latest)

granular.name: ctx_session

granular.description: Share cached file contexts between agents. Actions: push (share files from your cache to another agent), pull (receive files shared by other agents), list (show all shared contexts), clear (remove your shared contexts).

message.description: Optional context message explaining what was shared

paths.description: Comma-separated file paths to share (for push action)

to_agent.description: Target agent ID (omit for broadcast to all agents)

granular.name: ctx_share

granular.description: Run shell command (compressed output, 95+ patterns). Use raw=true to skip compression. cwd sets working directory (persists across calls via cd tracking). Output redaction is on by default for non-admin roles (admin can disable).

cwd.description: Working directory for the command. If omitted, uses last cd target or project root.

raw.description: Skip compression, return full uncompressed output. Redaction still applies by default for non-admin roles.

granular.name: ctx_shell

granular.description: Auto-select optimal read mode for a file.
granular.name: ctx_smart_read

granular.description: Read a specific symbol (function, struct, class) by name. Returns only the symbol code block instead of the entire file. 90-97% fewer tokens than full file read.

file.description: Optional: file path to narrow search

granular.name: ctx_symbol

granular.description: Multi-agent task orchestration. Actions: create|update|list|get|cancel|message|info.
granular.name: ctx_task

granular.description: Directory listing with file counts.
granular.name: ctx_tree

granular.description: Verification observability snapshot. Action stats returns versioned JSON or compact summary (no raw content).
granular.name: ctx_verify

granular.description: Workflow rails (state machine + evidence). Actions: start|status|transition|complete|evidence_add|evidence_list|stop.

spec.description: WorkflowSpec JSON (action=start). If omitted, uses builtin plan_code_test.

granular.name: ctx_workflow

granular.description: Savings report card. Deprecated alias for ctx_gain action=wrapped.
granular.name: ctx_wrapped

unified.description: Meta-tool: set tool= to sub-tool name. Sub-tools: compress (checkpoint), metrics (stats), analyze (entropy), cache (status|clear|invalidate), discover (missed patterns), smart_read (auto-mode), delta (incremental diff), dedup (cross-file), fill (budget-aware batch read), intent (auto-read by task), response (compress LLM text), context (session state), graph (build|related|symbol|impact|status), session (load|save|task|finding|decision|status|reset|list|cleanup), knowledge (remember|recall|pattern|consolidate|timeline|rooms|search|wakeup|status|remove|export|embeddings_status|embeddings_reset|embeddings_reindex), agent (register|post|read|status|list|info|diary|recall_diary|diaries), overview (project map), wrapped (savings report), benchmark (file|project), multi_read (batch), semantic_search (BM25), cost (attribution), heatmap (file access), impact (graph impact), architecture (graph structure), task (A2A tasks), workflow (state machine), expand (retrieve archived output).
unified.name: ctx

unified.description: Read file (cached, compressed). Modes: full|map|signatures|diff|aggressive|entropy|task|reference|lines:N-M. fresh=true re-reads.
unified.name: ctx_read

unified.description: Run shell command (compressed output). raw=true skips compression. cwd sets working directory.

cwd.description: Working directory (defaults to last cd or project root)

unified.name: ctx_shell
